query:
CREATE TABLE `attendances` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `matchId` int NOT NULL,
  `playerId` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('confirmed','pending','declined') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `confirmedAt` timestamp,
  `arrivedAt` timestamp,
  `arrivalOrder` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `attendances_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `attendance_match_player_unique` UNIQUE(`matchId`,`playerId`)
);
CREATE TABLE `expenses` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `matchId` int,
  `category` enum('field','materials','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'field',
  `description` varchar(240) NOT NULL,
  `amountCents` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `paidAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `expenses_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `gameEvents` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `matchId` int NOT NULL,
  `teamId` int,
  `playerId` int,
  `guestId` int,
  `type` enum('goal','yellow_card','red_card') NOT NULL,
  `minute` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `gameEvents_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `guests` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `matchId` int NOT NULL,
  `hostPlayerId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(160) NOT NULL,
  `amountCents` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1000,
  `paid` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `guests_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `matches` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(160) NOT NULL,
  `matchDate` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `confirmationDeadline` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `arrivalDeadline` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('scheduled','in_progress','finished','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'scheduled',
  `clockSeconds` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `clockRunning` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `matches_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `payments` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `playerId` int NOT NULL,
  `referenceMonth` varchar(7) NOT NULL,
  `amountCents` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `status` enum('pending','sent','confirmed','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `proofUrl` text,
  `rejectionReason` text,
  `submittedAt` timestamp,
  `confirmedAt` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `payments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `payment_player_month_unique` UNIQUE(`playerId`,`referenceMonth`)
);
CREATE TABLE `players` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int,
  `name` varchar(160) NOT NULL,
  `phone` varchar(32),
  `type` enum('line','goalkeeper','both') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'line',
  `monthlyFeeCents` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `isMonthlyMember` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `isRefereeAuthorized` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `active` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `players_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `refereeAssignments` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `matchId` int NOT NULL,
  `playerId` int NOT NULL,
  `role` enum('referee1','referee2','scorekeeper') NOT NULL,
  `rotationOrder` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `refereeAssignments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `teamPlayers` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `teamId` int NOT NULL,
  `matchId` int NOT NULL,
  `playerId` int,
  `guestId` int,
  `role` enum('line','goalkeeper','improvised_goalkeeper') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'line',
  `arrivalOrder` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `teamPlayers_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `teams` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `matchId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
  `playOrder` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `teams_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
ALTER TABLE `attendances` ADD CONSTRAINT `attendances_matchId_matches_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`matchId`) REFERENCES `matches`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `attendances` ADD CONSTRAINT `attendances_playerId_players_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`playerId`) REFERENCES `players`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `expenses` ADD CONSTRAINT `expenses_matchId_matches_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`matchId`) REFERENCES `matches`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `gameEvents` ADD CONSTRAINT `gameEvents_matchId_matches_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`matchId`) REFERENCES `matches`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `gameEvents` ADD CONSTRAINT `gameEvents_teamId_teams_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`teamId`) REFERENCES `teams`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `gameEvents` ADD CONSTRAINT `gameEvents_playerId_players_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`playerId`) REFERENCES `players`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `gameEvents` ADD CONSTRAINT `gameEvents_guestId_guests_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`guestId`) REFERENCES `guests`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `guests` ADD CONSTRAINT `guests_matchId_matches_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`matchId`) REFERENCES `matches`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `guests` ADD CONSTRAINT `guests_hostPlayerId_players_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`hostPlayerId`) REFERENCES `players`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `payments` ADD CONSTRAINT `payments_playerId_players_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`playerId`) REFERENCES `players`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `players` ADD CONSTRAINT `players_userId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `refereeAssignments` ADD CONSTRAINT `refereeAssignments_matchId_matches_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`matchId`) REFERENCES `matches`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `refereeAssignments` ADD CONSTRAINT `refereeAssignments_playerId_players_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`playerId`) REFERENCES `players`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `teamPlayers` ADD CONSTRAINT `teamPlayers_teamId_teams_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`teamId`) REFERENCES `teams`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `teamPlayers` ADD CONSTRAINT `teamPlayers_matchId_matches_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`matchId`) REFERENCES `matches`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `teamPlayers` ADD CONSTRAINT `teamPlayers_playerId_players_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`playerId`) REFERENCES `players`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `teamPlayers` ADD CONSTRAINT `teamPlayers_guestId_guests_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`guestId`) REFERENCES `guests`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
ALTER TABLE `teams` ADD CONSTRAINT `teams_matchId_matches_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`matchId`) REFERENCES `matches`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
